headline: 5 Quality Passive Income Blue-Chips That All Yield 5% and More Safely
summary: Blue-chip stocks are shares of large, well-established, financially stable companies with a consistent and reliable performance history. They are often considered less risky and are a popular choice for long-term investors. Additionally, nearly all leaders in the category pay dependable, recurring dividends each quarter, regardless of the state of the economy. The term “blue chip” ... 5 Quality Passive Income Blue-Chips That All Yield 5% and More Safely

headline: General Mills Tests Old El Paso TABASCO Tie Up As Shares Screen Cheap
summary: Old El Paso, a General Mills (NYSE:GIS) brand, is partnering with TABASCO Brand on limited-edition TABASCO Sauce flavored Taco Shells. The collaboration includes a Taco Totality Gear Box that plays on the rare overlap of Cinco de Mayo and Taco Tuesday. The products are being offered for a limited time, focusing on special-occasion meals and taco-themed celebrations. For a company like General Mills, which is rooted in shelf staples and center store categories, branded collaborations can be...

headline: Is General Mills (GIS) Offering An Opportunity After Its Prolonged Share Price Slump
summary: If you are wondering whether General Mills at around US$35.31 is priced as a bargain or a value trap, it helps to step back and look closely at what the current share price is really offering you. The stock has seen a 0.5% decline over the past week, a 5.1% decline over the last month, and returns of 22.8% decline year to date, 32.9% decline over 1 year, 55.1% decline over 3 years, and 33.1% decline over 5 years, which may change how investors think about both risk and potential upside from...

headline: Top 25 High-Yield Dividend Stocks For May 2026
summary: My May 2026 watchlist features 25 stocks with a 3.86% average yield and 18.9% CAGR potential, including names like CPB and ALV. Find out why valuation reversion is key.
